snapshot.content: Cycle 257: Enhanced the Fork-your-own section of README.md for the forkable template goal (task 5 of 6). Added a large Use this template badge linking to the template landing page, restructured into a clear 3-step flow (Fork & clean → Connect Supabase → Launch), and added a 7-item What you get feature list. Updated cycle count badge to 250+. One task remains: end-to-end validation of the fork flow.
snapshot.current_focus: End-to-end validation of the fork flow (task 6 of forkable template goal). Walk through clone, fork-init.sh, template-setup.sh, verify CLAUDE.md, schema, seed data.

pending_tasks.title: End-to-end validation of fork flow
pending_tasks.goal_title: Package living-board as a forkable autonomous agent template
